message:
fix(runtime+codegen): UnifiedInt equality, __index__ error handling, error discards

- Add UnifiedInt.eqlSimple() for allocator-free equality comparison
- Add pyAnyEql() special case for UnifiedInt to use eqlSimple()
- Make UnifiedInt.parseUnicode() accept pointer types (*const [N]u8)
- Fix __index__() error union: wrap in try before @intCast
- Fix Zig 0.15 "error set is discarded" in unittest lifecycle:
  - Change `catch |err| { _ = err; ...}` to `catch { ... }`

Fixes test_int_literal by enabling proper UnifiedInt comparison.
